bundleModules: Core · Time Off · Performance · Trainings · Engagement · Recruitment (5 jobs) · Expenses (5 users)
implementationNote: $400 USD one-time · 7 hours guided onboarding · billing starts 30–45 days after onboarding
pricingJustification: 19 seats at $8/user (20% off $10), Recruitment 5 jobs, Time Off with approvals, Trainings + Engagement, Expenses for 5 users
context: Marketing company in Georgia USA, 19 employees, remote team in Morocco and internationally. No time tracking (flexible schedules). First HR software. Hiring expected to grow.
priorities: ATS/recruitment (LinkedIn, Indeed, Facebook), per-employee documents, role-based onboarding, e-signatures, time off, payslip distribution, trainings for new hires, expenses for AI/creative tools (5 users), org chart, future performance KPIs in HR (campaign KPIs stay in Go High Level).
mobileStory: Remote employees and Factorial One on mobile for policies and time off.
operationsStory: Replace Google Drive, email, and Sheets with Factorial Core, Recruitment, Time Off, Trainings, Engagement, and Expenses.
documentsStory: Document vault, onboarding workflows by role, fillable PDFs, bulk payslip split, offer letters with e-sign.
recruitmentStory: Full ATS with LinkedIn/Indeed/Glassdoor, pipeline, WhatsApp, calendar scheduling, offer letter templates.
payrollStory: Third-party payroll/bookkeeper — Factorial syncs; bulk payslip upload auto-routes to employees.
implementationStory: 7 hours onboarding, $400 one-time, up to 45 days full implementation; can go live on documents and time off in ~2 weeks.
nextSteps: Victor sends quote by email end of day. Rikia presents to manager. Decision beginning of next week. Factorial preferred vs other tools evaluated.
